title: Nishi Chaya
standfirst: The quiet geisha district — smaller than Higashi Chaya, less visited, and more intimate. The Ninja Temple is next door.

facts.label: Best for
facts.value: Authentic geisha culture, craft shopping, Ninja Temple combo

facts.label: Getting there
facts.value: Loop Bus (Hirokoji stop), 20min walk from station

facts.label: Vibe
facts.value: Quiet, authentic, less touristy than Higashi Chaya
